heading: Child custody protection
label: 3938 Child custody protection
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to section 528 of the former Appendix to this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

children.heading: Duration of temporary custody order based on certain deployments
children.label: a Duration of temporary custody order based on certain deployments
children.text: If a court renders a temporary order for custodial responsibility for a child based solely on a deployment or anticipated deployment of a parent who is a servicemember, the court shall require that the temporary order shall expire not later than the period justified by the deployment of the servicemember.

children.heading: Limitation on consideration of member’s deployment in determination of child’s best interest
children.label: b Limitation on consideration of member’s deployment in determination of child’s best interest
children.text: If a motion or a petition is filed seeking a permanent order to modify the custody of the child of a servicemember, no court may consider the absence of the servicemember by reason of deployment, or the possibility of deployment, as the sole factor in determining the best interest of the child.

children.heading: No Federal jurisdiction or right of action or removal
children.label: c No Federal jurisdiction or right of action or removal
children.text: Nothing in this section shall create a Federal right of action or otherwise give rise to Federal jurisdiction or create a right of removal.

children.heading: Preemption
children.label: d Preemption
children.text: In any case where State law applicable to a child custody proceeding involving a temporary order as contemplated in this section provides a higher standard of protection to the rights of the parent who is a deploying servicemember than the rights provided under this section with respect to such temporary order, the appropriate court shall apply the higher State standard.
for which dependent travel is not authorized; or
that otherwise do not permit the movement of family members to that location.
